title: Is the AI Hype Even Real?
modules: How AI Hype Gets Made and Who Benefits From It
What AI Is Actually Good At Right Now √¢¬Ä¬î Honestly
What AI Gets Wrong: Hallucinations, Bias, and Blind Spots
Reading AI Headlines Without Getting Played
The Business of AI Doom and AI Optimism
AI Risk: Separating Real Concerns From Noise
Apply It: Audit an AI Claim You've Seen This Week
synopsis: Every week there's a new headline saying AI will either save the world or end it √¢¬Ä¬î and most of those headlines are selling you something. This course gives you the thinking tools to evaluate AI claims on your own so you're never the person repeating nonsense at dinner.
rationale: Young adults are the most exposed generation to AI misinformation and hype cycles, yet critical AI media literacy is almost entirely absent from accessible AI education.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can independently evaluate AI claims, identify who benefits from a given narrative, and explain the real capabilities and limits of current AI systems to others.
source_signals: Things are about to get worse for generative AI
